news.title: 中文互動讀寫班 2026年秋季招生
news.title_en: Interactive Chinese Literacy Class — Fall 2026 Enrollment
news.author: Calvin Chan
news.body:
語你童行中文互動讀寫班2026年秋季招生現正接受報名，設初階（3-5歲及K-Grade 3）及中階課程，兩個上課地點，並新增多個班次。

初階課程專為初學中文的學童而設，分為4個階梯，完成每個階梯將獲頒證書一張；中階課程適合識字量達80至100或已完成初階課程的學童，擴展中文詞彙及語法能力，邁向自主閱讀目標。

**地點：**
- 語你童行列治文服務中心，8181 Cambie Road, Unit 5530
- 溫哥華西區浸信會，8506 Ash Street, Vancouver

**教學語言：** 廣東話（歡迎自組：廣東話、國語、英語）

本季新增班次：列治文初階Lv.1（星期四及星期日）。

**2026年秋季班表**

| 地點 | 年齡 | 級別 | 時間 | 報名 |

| 列治文（8181 Cambie Road, Unit 5530） | 3-5歲 | Lv.4 | 逢星期六 9:30-10:45am | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/02be7b31-9aaf-4e78-80de-5e1c740c7482) |
| 列治文（8181 Cambie Road, Unit 5530） | 3-5歲 | Lv.3 | 逢星期六 11:15am-12:30pm | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/7a7facd6-7d5a-4608-89a4-0c1aaf302031) |
| 列治文（8181 Cambie Road, Unit 5530） | 3-5歲 | Lv.2（額滿） | 逢星期日 9:30-10:45am | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/2dd077f3-ec52-40a5-95fb-e4289f5afac7) |

| 列治文（8181 Cambie Road, Unit 5530） | 3-5歲 | Lv.1（新班） | 逢星期日 3:00-4:15pm | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/48b5ff26-5884-4ec6-9b8e-017e07ce5616) |

news.body_en:
Familogue’s Interactive Chinese Literacy Class opens Fall 2026 enrollment — beginner & intermediate tracks, two Vancouver-area locations, new times added.

The beginner program is designed for children new to Chinese and is divided into 4 levels, with a certificate awarded upon completion of each. The intermediate program suits children recognizing 80-100 characters (or who have completed the beginner program), expanding vocabulary and grammar toward independent reading.

**Locations:**
- Familogue Richmond Service Centre, 8181 Cambie Road, Unit 5530
- Westside Baptist Church, 8506 Ash Street, Vancouver

**Language of instruction:** Cantonese (self-organized groups welcome in Cantonese, Mandarin, or English)

New this season: additional beginner Lv.1 sessions in Richmond on Thursdays and Sundays.

**Fall 2026 Class Schedule**

news.title: OMNI電視台專訪Dr. Fay：社交媒體與AI對青少年的影響
news.title_en: OMNI Television Interview with Dr. Fay: Social Media & AI Impact on Adolescents
news.author: Calvin Chan
news.body:
Familogue創始成員Dr. Fay（教育學博士）接受OMNI電視台專訪，探討社交媒體與人工智能對青少年學習、心理健康及社會發展的影響。

Dr. Fay在訪談中分享了家長如何保持察覺，並為子女提供有意義的引導與支持。

**嘉賓：** Dr. Fay，教育學博士，Familogue創始成員

**頻道：** OMNI電視台

收看訪談（3:48起）：[YouTube 連結](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LmivfUXcTU&t=228)
news.body_en:
Familogue founding member Dr. Fay (PhD in Education) was featured on OMNI Television, discussing the impact of social media and AI on adolescents' learning, mental well-being, and social development.

Dr. Fay shares how parents can stay aware and provide meaningful guidance and support for their children navigating today's digital landscape.

**Guest:** Dr. Fay, PhD in Education, Familogue founding member

**Channel:** OMNI Television

Watch the interview (starting at 3:48): [YouTube link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LmivfUXcTU&t=228)

news.title: 語你童行夏日營 2026
news.author: Calvin Chan
news.body:
語你童行夏日營2026是專為4至8歲兒童而設的廣東話沉浸式全日營，於2026年7月6日至9月4日（共9週）在列治文舉行，每週均設有不同主題。

- **日期：** 2026年7月6日至9月4日（共9週）
- **時間：** 上午9:30 至下午1:00
- **地點：** Familogue 列治文服務中心，8181 Cambie Rd. Unit 5530, Richmond, BC
- **年齡：** 4至8歲
- **語言：** 廣東話
- **費用：** 每週$250（第5週4天，$200）

每週設有不同主題，由經驗豐富的導師帶領。按週報名，選擇最適合孩子的主題！

**每週時間表及報名連結**

| 週次 | 日期 | 主題 | 報名 |
|------|------|------|------|
| 第1週 | 7月6日至10日 | 故事活動夏日營 | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/14bc92ce-1e87-4980-8fa4-fd2e82abd567) |
| 第2週 | 7月13日至17日 | STEM 教育 | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/e58a1e62-e6ba-4f9c-bdd1-8a2ca1e3d5ab) |
| 第3週 | 7月20日至24日 | 多媒體創作夏日營 | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/545051ed-d54c-457d-bc7f-9bf0acaf653a) |
| 第4週 | 7月27日至31日 | 靜觀及情緒管理 | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/52afdedf-9674-4b1d-86f4-2e9d4f06b877) |
| 第5週 | 8月4日至7日 | 故事活動夏日營（4天，$200） | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/3bae51d3-1ede-439c-874f-a8795d6c001e) |
| 第6週 | 8月10日至14日 | 繪本創作夏日營 | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/c4b0ba30-27c1-471e-991d-073e608e5901) |
| 第7週 | 8月17日至21日 | 靜觀及情緒管理夏日營 - Part 2 | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/98e931cc-a45d-4e9d-8327-94b62ec684cb) |
| 第8週 | 8月24日至28日 | 藝術故事與創作夏日營 | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/332f6fcc-00b5-4252-86a8-2e8f2a561752) |
| 第9週 | 8月31日至9月4日 | 小小專注力探險隊夏日營 | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/1baa095d-a624-4f27-81a8-bc31b4da18f9) |

延長照顧服務可至下午3:00，額外收費$10/小時 — [按此報名延長時間 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/364acc43-57fa-4f17-b2cd-74a15d00468f)
news.body_en:
Familogue Summer Camp 2026 (語你童行夏日營) is a 9-week Cantonese-immersion day camp for children ages 4–8, running July 6 – September 4 in Richmond, BC, with a different theme each week.

- **Date:** July 6 – September 4, 2026 (9 weeks)
- **Time:** 9:30 AM – 1:00 PM daily
- **Location:** Familogue Richmond Service Centre, 8181 Cambie Rd. Unit 5530, Richmond, BC
- **Age:** 4–8 years old
- **Language:** Cantonese
- **Cost:** $250/week (W5: $200 for 4 days)

Each week features a different theme led by experienced educators. Register by the week — choose the themes that match your child's interests!

**Weekly Schedule & Registration**

| Week | Dates | Theme | Register |
|------|-------|-------|----------|
| W1 | Jul 6–10 | Story Fun Camp | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/14bc92ce-1e87-4980-8fa4-fd2e82abd567) |
| W2 | Jul 13–17 | STEM Summer Camp | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/e58a1e62-e6ba-4f9c-bdd1-8a2ca1e3d5ab) |
| W3 | Jul 20–24 | Mixed Media Making Summer Camp | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/545051ed-d54c-457d-bc7f-9bf0acaf653a) |
| W4 | Jul 27–31 | Mindfulness & Emotional Regulation Summer Camp | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/52afdedf-9674-4b1d-86f4-2e9d4f06b877) |
| W5 | Aug 4–7 | Story Fun Summer Camp (4 days, $200) | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/3bae51d3-1ede-439c-874f-a8795d6c001e) |
| W6 | Aug 10–14 | Illustration Summer Camp | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/c4b0ba30-27c1-471e-991d-073e608e5901) |
| W7 | Aug 17–21 | Mindfulness Summer Camp - Part 2 | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/98e931cc-a45d-4e9d-8327-94b62ec684cb) |
| W8 | Aug 24–28 | Art Stories Summer Camp | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/332f6fcc-00b5-4252-86a8-2e8f2a561752) |
| W9 | Aug 31–Sep 4 | Little Focus Explorers Summer Camp | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/1baa095d-a624-4f27-81a8-bc31b4da18f9) |

Extended care available until 3:00 PM for $10/hour — [register for extended hour →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/364acc43-57fa-4f17-b2cd-74a15d00468f)

news.title: 玩轉廣東話夏季班 2026
news.author: Calvin Chan
news.body:
Familogue 語你童行的「玩轉廣東話 Playful Canto Club」夏季班現正接受報名，專為 3–6 歲小朋友設計，透過歌曲、故事及遊戲輕鬆學廣東話。

**日期：** 7月26日、8月9日、16日及23日（星期日）  
**時間：** 9:30–10:45 AM 或 11:15 AM–12:30 PM  
**地點：** 語你童行列治文服務中心  
8181 Cambie Rd. Unit 5530, Richmond, BC V6X 1J8  
**費用：** $98（4堂）

課程內容包括廣東話兒歌、故事時間、文字遊戲、桌遊及手工藝，讓孩子在輕鬆有趣的環境中培養聆聽及說話能力。

| 班節 | 日期 | 時間 | 報名 |
|------|------|------|------|
| 第一節 | 7月26日、8月9日、16日、23日 | 9:30–10:45 AM | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/c981aef5-7d2d-44cb-a9df-e5419de9bf3e) |
| 第二節 | 7月26日、8月9日、16日、23日 | 11:15 AM–12:30 PM | [報名 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/c981aef5-7d2d-44cb-a9df-e5419de9bf3e) |
news.body_en:
Familogue's Playful Canto Club offers interactive Cantonese classes for children ages 3–6 this summer, running Sundays in July and August 2026.

**Date:** Sundays — July 26, August 9, 16 & 23, 2026  
**Time:** 9:30–10:45 AM or 11:15 AM–12:30 PM  
**Location:** Familogue Richmond Service Centre  
8181 Cambie Rd. Unit 5530, Richmond, BC V6X 1J8  
**Cost:** $98 for 4 sessions

Activities include Cantonese children's songs, storytelling, literacy games, board games, and arts & crafts — all in a relaxed, play-based atmosphere designed to build listening and speaking skills.

| Session | Dates | Time | Registration |
|---------|-------|------|--------------|
| Session 1 | Jul 26, Aug 9, 16, 23 | 9:30–10:45 AM | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/c981aef5-7d2d-44cb-a9df-e5419de9bf3e) |
| Session 2 | Jul 26, Aug 9, 16, 23 | 11:15 AM–12:30 PM | [Register →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/c981aef5-7d2d-44cb-a9df-e5419de9bf3e) |

news.title: 語你童行四週年紀念慈善拍賣會 2026
news.author: Calvin Chan
news.body:
語你童行教育學會誠意邀請您參與四週年紀念慈善拍賣會！今年的義賣活動旨在支持廣東話語言保育，所有收益將直接用於語你童行的社區服務項目。

**拍賣截止日期：** 2026年7月2日（星期三）凌晨12:00 PDT

**領獎地點：** 8181 Cambie Rd. Unit 5530, Richmond, BC V6X 1J8

**拍賣品（部分）：**

- Vancouver Bach Family of Choirs 門票兌換券（底價 $150，市值 $350）
- Cotton Tree Learning Box（底價 $15，市值 $39.99）
- JM 手製袋（底價 $25，市值 $50）
- Snackshot 兌換券（$50 及 $100 面值）
- Man In Canada Foods 禮品套裝（底價 $25，市值 $51）
- JC Vancouver Beauty 護膚療程（底價 $30，市值 $68）
- 《Yuto》兒童繪本（底價 $10，市值 $16.99）

感謝各贊助商的慷慨捐贈，共同支持廣東話社區。

[🎟️ 立即參與拍賣 →](https://www.zeffy.com/en-CA/ticketing/familogue-4th-anniversary-silent-auction--2026)
news.body_en:
Familogue Education Society invites you to participate in our 4th Anniversary Silent Auction! This fundraising event supports Cantonese language preservation — all proceeds go directly toward Familogue's community services.

**Auction closes:** Wednesday, July 2, 2026 at 12:00 a.m. PDT

**Prize Pick-Up Location:** 8181 Cambie Rd. Unit 5530, Richmond, BC V6X 1J8

**Auction highlights:**

- Vancouver Bach Family of Choirs Ticket Voucher (starting bid $150, retail $350)
- Cotton Tree Learning Box (starting bid $15, retail $39.99)
- JM Handmade Bags (starting bid $25, retail $50)
- Snackshot Vouchers ($50 and $100 values)
- Man In Canada Foods Package (starting bid $25, retail $51)
- JC Vancouver Beauty Facial Treatment (starting bid $30, retail $68)
- Yuto Children's Book (starting bid $10, retail $16.99)

Thank you to all our generous sponsors for supporting the Cantonese community.

[🎟️ Join the Auction →](https://www.zeffy.com/en-CA/ticketing/familogue-4th-anniversary-silent-auction--2026)

news.title: 週年會員大會通知 2026
news.author: Calvin Chan
news.body:
現通知 語你童行將舉行週年會員大會（AGM），詳情如下：

**日期：** 2026年6月20日（星期六）

**時間：** 下午 1:30 – 2:00

**地點：** Thompson Community Centre 多用途室1（5151 Granville Ave, Richmond, BC V7C 1E6）

**線上會議：** [https://meet.google.com/pmf-mckb-icy](https://meet.google.com/pmf-mckb-icy)
撥號（加拿大）：+1 587-688-7972 PIN: 837 217 309#

**議程：**

1. 董事會報告
2. 財務報表匯報
3. 選舉 2026-2027 年度董事會
4. 其他事項

所有良好狀態會員均可出席，而所有良好狀態而擁有投票權的會員均可在會議投票。

承董事會命，

Ms Felicia Cheung（主席，語你童行教育學會）

[下載週年會員大會通知 PDF](/assets/Familogue_AGM_Notice.pdf)

[✨ 投票會員登記 →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/b82eaa1c-e929-4dcb-bf78-f8fe3822a332)
news.body_en:
NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN that the Annual General Meeting (AGM) of Familogue Education Society will be held as follows:

**Date:** 2026, Jun 20 (Sat)

**Time:** 1:30 – 2:00pm

**Location:** Multipurpose Room 1, Thompson Community Centre (5151 Granville Ave, Richmond, BC V7C 1E6)

**Virtual:** [https://meet.google.com/pmf-mckb-icy](https://meet.google.com/pmf-mckb-icy)
Or dial: (CA) +1 587-688-7972 PIN: 837 217 309#

**Agenda:**

1. Directors' report
2. Presentation of financial statements
3. Election of Board of Directors of 2026-2027
4. Other business

All members in good standing are entitled to attend and all voting members in good standing are entitled to vote at the meeting.

By order of the Board,

Ms Felicia Cheung (Chairman, Familogue Education Society)

[Download AGM Notice PDF](/assets/Familogue_AGM_Notice.pdf)

[✨ Voting Member Registration →](https://store.familogue.ca/items/b82eaa1c-e929-4dcb-bf78-f8fe3822a332)
